message:
feat(api): complete compileWithSchema() for direct LanceQL integration

Wire up the full compilation pipeline in api.zig:
- Add imports for lexer, parser, native_codegen, compiler
- Implement real Python->Zig compilation with all phases
- Support shared library output with automatic temp path
- Extract exported function names from generated code

This allows LanceQL to call metal0.compileWithSchema() directly
instead of spawning subprocess with --emit-logic-table-shared.
